title: CARB Reports to the Governor in Response to Executive Order on ZEV Deployment
content: California agencies delivered a report to Gov. Gavin Newsom outlining six priority actions to accelerate ZEV adoption, protecting the Low Carbon Fuel Standard, bolstering incentives for low-income drivers, expanding reliable charging and hydrogen fueling, lowering charging costs, strengthening consumer protections and regulations, and adopting ZEV-first fleet procurement. A key proposal is a statewide indirect source rule to curb freight-related emissions in overburdened communities. Developed with input from 1,000+ participants and 200 comments, the recommendations aim to expand clean vehicle adoption, safeguard consumers, and sustain Californiaâ€™s leadership despite federal rollbacks.
author: Analysts Account
